THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, ZACHARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BURRESS, GLORIA T. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST THE MASTER TENANT, SUB LEASOR ESTHER WEAVER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
